es.title: Diccionario: Aorta
es.description: Aorta: la aorta es el principal vaso sanguíneo que lleva sangre procedente del corazón al resto del cuerpo.

en.title: Dictionary: Aorta
en.description: aorta (ay-OR-tah): The aorta is the major blood vessel that carries blood away from the heart to the rest of the body. More on this topic for: • Parents More on this topicFor Parents • Coarctation of the Aorta • Interrupted Aortic Arch (IAA) • The Norwood Procedure • The Fontan Procedure • The Glenn Procedure • Hypoplastic Left Heart Syndrome (HLHS) View more Share: • Share to Facebook • Share to Twitter • Share to Pinterest RELATED CATEGORY • Heart & Blood Vessels
